title: Server Essential Mods
description: The ultimate server-side performance modpack featuring elite performance optimizations, LuckPerms management, and essential utility for any hardware.
body:
🚀 Server Essentials
The definitive server-side performance modpack — from budget hosts to powerhouses.
Server Essentials is a lightweight, "plug-and-play" modpack designed for server-side performance and administrative control. It is built to ensure rock-solid stability and high TPS (Ticks Per Second), whether you are running a small private server on a budget host or a high-traffic community on a dedicated powerhouse.
📈 Scalability: Low-End to High-End
This pack is engineered to optimize the server's back-end logic regardless of hardware:
Low-End Servers: Focused on reducing CPU overhead and memory leaks, allowing servers with limited RAM to run smoothly.
High-End Servers: Optimized for high player counts and entity management, ensuring the server stays at 20 TPS even under heavy load.
🛠️ Key Features
⚡ Server Performance: Optimized with Lithium for game logic, FerriteCore for memory reduction, and Krypton for network stack optimization.
🛡️ Admin Power: Pre-packaged with LuckPerms, the gold standard for managing ranks, permissions, and staff roles.
📍 Built-in Utility: Includes Mini Teleport, providing essential /tpa, /home, and /spawn commands without the bloat of traditional plugins.
⚙️ Clean & Stable: A strictly server-side collection. No client-side fluff—just the essential tools needed to run a professional, high-performance environment.
🚀 Quick Start
Deploy Server Essentials to your server files.
Launch the server; all performance optimizations are active immediately.
Use /lp editor to customize your server's permissions and ranks.

License
Server Essentials is protected under All Rights Reserved.
You are welcome to use this modpack for your own servers, but you may not re-upload, redistribute, or host the pack files on other websites without my express permission.
join my Discord if you have a proplem with your License
